ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "expName" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_color" TEXT /* Color theme of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "session" INTEGER /* Session number of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who designed the experiment */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Status of ethical approval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the stimulus is associated with */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., Living_Things, Nonliving_Things) */,
  "probe_path" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus image */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the stimulus (e.g., Marine_creatures, Animals) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, sound, text) */,
  "stimulus_format" TEXT /* Format of the stimulus file (e.g., jpg, png, mp3) */,
  "stimulus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the stimulus file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stimulus for this trial */,
  "fixation_duration" REAL /* Duration of fixation in milliseconds */,
  "trials_thisRepN" INTEGER /* Trial number of this repetition */,
  "trials_thisTrialN" INTEGER /* Trial number of this specific trial */,
  "trials_thisN" INTEGER /* Overall trial number */,
  "trials_thisIndex" INTEGER /* Index of the trial in the experiment */,
  "image_onset_time" REAL /* Time of image onset in milliseconds */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant who completed the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which this response is recorded */,
  "response_window" TEXT /* Window of time allowed for response */,
  "correctAns" INTEGER /* Correct answer for the trial */,
  "probe_onset" REAL /* Time of probe onset in milliseconds */,
  "discrim_resptime" REAL /* Response time to discrimination in milliseconds */,
  "response_corr" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response was correct (1) or incorrect (0) */,
  "response_keys" TEXT /* Keys pressed by the participant during the response */,
  "response_rt" REAL /* Reaction time in milliseconds */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., key press, voice, eye movement) */,
  "response_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visible_responses" (
  "visible_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visible response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial for which this visible response is recorded */,
  "visible_resptime" REAL /* Response time for the visible response in milliseconds */,
  "visible_keys" TEXT /* Keys pressed during the visible response */,
  "visible_corr" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visible response was correct (1) or incorrect (0) */,
  "visible_rt" REAL /* Reaction time of the visible response in milliseconds */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of visible response (e.g., key press, voice, eye movement) */,
  "response_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their visible response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visible response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visible response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visible_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visible_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jitter_params" (
  "jitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jitter parameter entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial related to this jitter parameter */,
  "probeFrames" INTEGER /* Number of probe frames used in the trial */,
  "jitter2" REAL /* Value of the jitter parameter */,
  "n_square" INTEGER /* Square dimension for the jitter calculation */,
  "jitter_type" TEXT /* Type of jitter (e.g., temporal, spatial) */,
  "jitter_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the jitter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the jitter parameter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the jitter parameter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jitter_params_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "image_meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image metadata entry */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stimulus related to this metadata */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in pixels */,
  "premask_dur" INTEGER /* Duration of the premask before the image appears */,
  "postmask_dur" INTEGER /* Duration of the postmask after the image disappears */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image metadata record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image metadata record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)
